Container.Name: Spoolman-NG
Container.Overview: Spoolman NG keeps track of your inventory of 3D-printer filament spools. It integrates with OctoPrint and Klipper/Moonraker, updating spool weights automatically as printing progresses, and includes QR-code label printing, NFC spool identification, a community filament catalog, and a REST API. Community-maintained, drop-in-compatible continuation of the original Spoolman by Donkie: point it at an existing Spoolman data directory and it migrates automatically on first start (back it up first). All configuration is via SPOOLMAN_* environment variables, documented at https://github.com/sherrmann/Spoolman-NG/blob/master/docs/installation.md

Config.Name: Web UI port
Config.Description: Host port for the web UI and API. Point Moonraker's [spoolman] server setting at http://[unraid-ip]:[this port].

Config.Name: Data directory
Config.Description: Where the SQLite database and its automatic backups live. Migrating from upstream Spoolman? Point this at a copy of your existing data directory.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone (e.g. Europe/Stockholm), used for timestamps in the UI/API.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: UID that owns the data directory (Unraid default: 99 = nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: GID that owns the data directory (Unraid default: 100 = users).
